spec.reasoning: The task references specific cell addresses (S2, U2, R2:R20), so layout changes that shift rows (blank_row_insert, title_row_insert) are unsafe. Instead, I use lexical renames on columns that are referenced by name in the instruction ('Remarks' -> 'Notes', 'Invoice in KA' -> 'KA Invoice') and rename the sheet. I do NOT rename 'Difference' because it appears as a general English word in the instruction body ('Difference is...'). A distractor column 'Variance' is added after the last column — it's plausibly similar to 'Difference' but clearly distinct. These changes test whether the model hardcodes column names and sheet names without altering task logic or difficulty.
